headline: Amended Return Filing Preparation Checklist — St Paul
articleBody:
Amended Return Filing Preparation Checklist for St Paul Clients

Before your Amended Return Filing appointment with FICA Tax Credits & Refunds, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Payroll records
2. Tip reports
3. Tax returns
4. Employee w-2s
5. Credit card statements

Contact FICA Tax Credits & Refunds at (213) 537-5613 to get started.
